import React from 'react'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { ArrowLeft, User, MapPin, Clock, FileText, Car, Users, ShieldCheck, XCircle, MessageCircle, ExternalLink, Smartphone } from 'lucide-react'; const VisitorDetailView = ({ visitor, onBack, onAction }) => { if (!visitor) return null; const allVisitors = [ { name: visitor.name, nic: visitor.nic, isLeader: true }, ...(visitor.members || []) ]; return ( {/* Back Header */}
{/* Subtle Background Mark */}
{/* Header */}
{visitor.batchId}

{visitor.name}

Batch Authorization Protocol Activated

{/* Minimalist Visitor List */}

Authorized Personnel List

{allVisitors.map((v, i) => (
0{i+1}
{v.name} {v.isLeader && ( Team Leader )}
NIC: {v.nic || 'NOT PROVIDED'}
))}
{/* Footer Info */}

Visit Area

{visitor.areas.join(' | ')}

Time In

{visitor.timeIn}

Purpose

{visitor.purpose}

Auth Protocol

Level 01 Clearance

 ); }; export default VisitorDetailView;
